Why Choose Us?

🚀

Auto-Updating

Playlists are automatically validated and updated daily using GitHub Actions. No more dead links.

📺

Modern Web Player

A Netflix-style premium web player with HLS.js, EPG support, and Picture-in-Picture.

🔒

Free & Open Source

100% community driven. No hidden fees, no trackers, completely transparent.

Get the Playlist

Use this URL in your favorite IPTV player (VLC, TiviMate, etc.):

https://shoumikbalasomu.github.io/ALL-IN-One-IPTV/playlist.m3u
